concerns.analysis: The output JSON incorrectly nests several major sections as subsections of others. In the source PDF, 'Status and Discussion of Priorities Before Council' (page 1), 'Geographic Information System (GIS) Study' (page 2), 'Presentation: North Carolina Economic Development Intelligence System' (page 3), and 'Local/State/Regional/Federal Data Sharing ad hoc Committee' (page 4) are all peer-level major sections identified by underlined headings. However, the output nests the latter three under 'Status
